remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target instant card in your graveyard with mana value X or less
remaining_params.SpellDescription: You may cast up to one target instant card and/or up to one target sorcery card from your graveyard each with mana value X or less without paying their mana costs. If a spell cast this way would be put into your graveyard this turn, exile it instead. If X is 10 or more, copy each of those spells twice. You may choose new targets for the copies.
